final:
module top_module (
        input p,
        input q,
        input r,
  wire temp1_( ~p & ~q & ~r ) |
				( ~p & q & ~r ) |
				( p & ~q & ~r ) = ( ~p & ~q & ~r ) |
				( ~p & q & ~r ) |
				( p & ~q & ~r );
  wire temp2_( p & q & r ) = ( p & q & r );
  assign h = temp1_( ~p & ~q & ~r ) |
				( ~p & q & ~r ) |
				( p & ~q & ~r ) | temp2_( p & q & r ) ;

endmodule
